body.title: Resource accounting: inference budget ledger with per-CoA and per-session tracking
body.result: budget_ledger.py + debit hook + MCP tools + cortex migrations + 26 tests — all completion criteria satisfied
body.description:
Every inference call routes through the inference device. Add a budget ledger that debits every call and tracks spend across the full hierarchy: agent_type → instance → CoA → session. Two modes: tracking-only (Anthropic max account) and enforcing (OpenRouter — hard limits per session and overall).

Ledger schema (clan.budget_ledger): agent_id, instance_id, coa_id, session_id, provider, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, cost_usd (null for non-OR), ts. Indexed on (agent_id, session_id) for fast per-session queries.

MCP tools on inference device: budget_summary(agent_id, group_by='session'|'coa'|'instance') → spend[]; budget_limit_set(agent_id, scope, limit_usd) → ok; budget_remaining(agent_id, session_id) → {remaining_usd, pct_used}.

Agent profiles declare optional budget limits: session_limit_usd, overall_limit_usd. Inference device checks limits before dispatch when provider=openrouter; tracking-only when provider=anthropic_max or ollama.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/device.py (debit hook), devices/inference/budget_ledger.py (new), clan schema migration (budget_ledger table), config/profiles/ (budget_limit fields)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; clan.budget_ledger is cross-instance shared; Postgres handles concurrent debit writes correctly
**Scope boundary:** IN — ledger, debit on every inference call, budget_summary/limit/remaining MCP tools, profile-declared limits, OR enforcement; OUT — billing integration, cost alerts to Akien (that's nanny's job), retroactive backfill
**Completion criteria:** after 3 inference calls, budget_summary(agent_id='igor') returns correct token counts grouped by session; budget_remaining returns correct value against a set limit; OR provider call rejected when limit exceeded; max/ollama calls proceed without limit check
